channel.title: Silent Witness: True Crime Trials in 60 Seconds
channel.description: The courtroom moments, landmark verdicts, and trials that defined justice — 60 seconds each.
channel.itunes:author: Silent Witness
channel.itunes:summary: The courtroom moments, landmark verdicts, and trials that defined justice — 60 seconds each.

item.title: German War Crimes
item.description: The governments of the German Empire and Nazi Germany (under Adolf Hitler) ordered, organized, and condoned a substantial number of war crimes, first in the Namibian genocide and then in the First and Second World Wars. The most notable of these is the Holocaust, in which millions of European Jews, Romanis and Slavs were systematically abused, deported, and murdered. Millions of civilians and pris
